notes: Current trace-bounded responsibility for Cleanup budget algebra. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.

Stable closed union: finite pairwise-disjoint alternatives, fixed expected-type unique injection, explicit narrowing, no automatic join or implicit extraction. is/!is requires one normalized closed Union subject and one exact declared alternative target, evaluates the subject and stored injection identity once, binds or consumes no value, and returns Bool with complementary bounded Phi facts. It performs no subtyping, refinement, reflection, Trait, witness, or provider search and cannot participate directly in a comparison chain. Product implementation NOT_RUN.
Stable contract intersection: at most one concrete base, coherent Trait evidence, no structural merge or distribution. Product implementation NOT_RUN.
